Package sailpoint.web.certification

Class CertificationItemBean.ViolationBean

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.web.PageCodeBase
      • sailpoint.web.BaseBean
        • sailpoint.web.certification.CertificationItemBean
          • sailpoint.web.certification.CertificationItemBean.EntitlementBean
            • sailpoint.web.certification.CertificationItemBean.ViolationBean
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    javax.faces.component.StateHolder, sailpoint.web.UserContext
    Enclosing class:
    CertificationItemBean
    public static class CertificationItemBean.ViolationBean
extends CertificationItemBean.EntitlementBean
    UI bean used to hold information about PolicyViolations. PolicyViolation is already a decent string returning bean, so we will use it directly.

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
